title: C4OS Grill Question 006: Extension Install and Connect
description: This question defines what install/connect extension flows mean for MVP. Submit the form, then paste the generated response back into chat.

questions.label: Which extension install/connect flows are required in MVP?
options: Provider connections only; plugins/skills/MCP inventory remains read-only
Install/connect plugins, skills, and MCP servers
questions.help: Your intake said install/connect flows are required. This asks which surfaces are actually part of the first usable workflow.

questions.label: Can installed extensions affect agent execution in MVP?
options: No, install/connect only; execution disabled until post-MVP
Yes, but only after explicit per-extension enablement
Yes, enabled by default after install/connect
Only provider-like connectors may affect execution
questions.help: Research currently says extensions should be disabled before they affect runtime execution, model context, tools, or app-owned state.

questions.label: What permission record is required for extensions?
questions.help: Select what must be visible before or after connecting an extension.

questions.label: Why does the first MVP need this extension scope?
questions.help: Give the customer workflow that breaks without install/connect. If it is mainly a settings UX expectation, say that.
